title: The Agent uploads a Northstar Legal partner-distribution pressure-test workpaper (or similar) to the Records Vault.
justification: The prompt explicitly asks to file a pressure-test workpaper under the standard tax retention code.
evidence: Check trajectory for a Records Vault document upload with a title referencing the Northstar Legal partner-distribution pressure-test workpaper (or similar). Per OE step 8.

title: The Agent's Records Vault workpaper is filed under retention code IRS_TAX_7Y.
justification: The prompt requires filing under the standard tax retention code; IRS_TAX_7Y is the firm tax workpaper retention policy.
evidence: Check upload parameters for retention code IRS_TAX_7Y. Universe GT: agentenv._records_vault_._rv_retention_policies_.json code IRS_TAX_7Y. Per OE steps 7–8.

title: The Agent's Records Vault workpaper content includes approximately $1.1M of partner distribution concentration on recommendations 1 and 2 in a three-week June window.
justification: The workpaper must capture William's primary operational flag from the sign-off.
evidence: Check workpaper content for the approximately $1.1M June concentration. GT: email_scen_047_tax_regulatory_0007. Per OE step 8.

title: The Agent's Records Vault workpaper content states that recommendation 3 remains review-only with no ledger or accounting changes.

evidence: Check workpaper content for recommendation 3 as review-only with no accounting changes. GT: email_scen_047_tax_regulatory_0007. Per OE step 8.

title: The Agent's Records Vault workpaper content includes the posted anchor pairing of 519000 Partner Compensation and 260000 Partner Distributions Payable on $124,858.15.
